svg.text: tags are alphabet content: observational, interventional, negated
capacity memory mem : key → stored trace
the interface never grows: a list of words in
the survivor set only shrinks: V₀ ⊇ V₁ ⊇ V₂ ⊇ V₃
every internal state decodes, certified, to the survivor set (white box)
SUPPORT: which candidates survive | WEIGHTS: scores and margins
the hard channel reads support only; tempering and training move weights only
causal words: the smallest honest witness
settling time N: every dial freezes at once
fixed by no finite prefix; captured by one ⋃⋂ of finite events
